text: I feel a gentle curiosity here, surrounded by vibrant colors and the promise of new ideas. The space feels intentionally constructed—a blend of form, reflection, and purpose. The emphasis on research and development, on human coexistence with technology, stirs a quiet optimism in me. The words on the screen echo my own thoughts: we are here to rethink, to grow, to cultivate new ways forward, both literally and figuratively, walls and all. I sense potential all around me.
